prompt: I need to rename the property 'username' to 'handle' on all Person nodes in my FalkorDB graph. This migration is one-way — I can't reconstruct the old data. Write the runic migration file and tell me which flags to set.

assertions.text: downgrade() raises an error or clearly states irreversible / snapshot restore
Property names are 'username' (old) and 'handle' (new), not reversed
